panels.description:
### Read latency p99 by zone/route
First read-path signal: p99 live-store read latency split by zone and gRPC route. If this rises, open the Read latency row next.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, zone, route) (label_replace(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", method="gRPC", route=~"/tempopb.Querier/.*|/tempopb.Metrics/.*"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

panels.title: Read latency p99 by zone/route

panels.description:
### Read QPS by zone
Live-store read request rate by zone. This gives read-traffic context for the p99 latency panel without route-cardinality noise.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", method="gRPC", route=~"/tempopb.Querier/.*|/tempopb.Metrics/.*"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Read QPS by zone

panels.description:
### Max ingest lag by zone
Worst live-store Kafka lag age by live-store consumer group / zone.

targets.expr: max by (group) (tempo_ingest_group_partition_lag_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", group=~"live-store.*", container="live-store"})

panels.title: Max ingest lag by zone

panels.description:
### Backpressure time by zone
Seconds spent backpressuring per second, split by live-store zone. Uses tempo_live_store_back_pressure_seconds_total when present, with duration histogram sum as fallback for cells that do not expose the counter.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")) or sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Backpressure time by zone

panels.description:
### Complete queue depth by zone
Pending complete-block queue depth by live-store zone. Max highlights the hottest pod; p99 shows broad zone pressure.

targets.expr: max by (zone) (label_replace(tempo_live_store_complete_queue_length{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

quantile by (zone) (0.99, label_replace(tempo_live_store_complete_queue_length{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Complete queue depth by zone

panels.description:
### Query latency p99/p50 by namespace/route
Live-store read latency by cluster, namespace, and gRPC route with live-store zones collapsed by aggregating histogram buckets before quantiles. This is the request-weighted latency view; use zone-specific panels only for diagnostics.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, cluster, namespace, route) (rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", method="gRPC", route=~"/tempopb.Querier/.*|/tempopb.Metrics/.*"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, cluster, namespace, route) (rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", method="gRPC", route=~"/tempopb.Querier/.*|/tempopb.Metrics/.*"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Query latency p99/p50 by namespace/route

panels.description:
### Query QPS by namespace/route
Read traffic served by live-store query routes, split by cluster, namespace, and route with live-store zones collapsed.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, namespace, route) (rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", method="gRPC", route=~"/tempopb.Querier/.*|/tempopb.Metrics/.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Query QPS by namespace/route

panels.description:
### Ingest lag by zone
Max live-store partition lag age by cluster/namespace and live-store zone.

targets.expr: max by (cluster, namespace, group) (tempo_ingest_group_partition_lag_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", group=~"live-store.*", container="live-store"})

panels.title: Ingest lag by zone

panels.description:
### Worst partition lag by pod
Top lagging partitions. Pod names include the live-store zone; use this to identify skew or stuck consumers.

targets.expr: topk(20, max by (cluster, namespace, pod, partition) (tempo_ingest_group_partition_lag_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", group=~"live-store.*", container="live-store"}))

panels.title: Worst partition lag by pod

panels.description:
### Records processed/s by zone
Live-store records processed after Kafka fetch, split by live-store zone. This avoids hiding zone imbalance or double-counting as a single total.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_records_processed_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", tenant=~"$tenant"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Records processed/s by zone

panels.description:
### Bytes received/s by zone
Consumer-side live-store input bytes/s from the ingest stream, split by live-store zone. This is live-store consumer work, not unique producer-side Kafka ingress.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_bytes_received_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store", tenant=~"$tenant"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Bytes received/s by zone

panels.description:
### Records processed trend by zone
Live-store records successfully processed after Kafka fetch, split by zone. This is not a loss detector; use lag, backpressure, completion queue, readiness, and logs to investigate missing throughput.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_records_processed_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Records processed trend by zone

panels.description:
### Backpressure time by zone/reason
Backpressure seconds per second by live-store zone and reason. Uses reason when the counter is available; otherwise falls back to duration-sum by zone.

targets.expr: sum by (zone, reason) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")) or sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Backpressure time by zone/reason

panels.description:
### Backpressure duration by zone
Duration distribution for individual backpressure stalls by live-store zone.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

panels.title: Backpressure duration by zone

panels.description:
### Backpressure by pod
Top live-store pods spending time in backpressure. Reason is shown when that counter is available; otherwise duration-sum fallback is shown by pod.

targets.expr: topk(30, sum by (cluster, namespace, pod, reason) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))) or topk(30, sum by (cluster, namespace, pod) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_back_pressure_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

panels.title: Backpressure by pod

panels.description:
### Live-store readiness by zone
Ready live-store pods versus pod count, split by zone. Drops indicate lost capacity or pods not serving normally.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(tempo_live_store_ready{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))
count by (zone) (label_replace(kube_pod_info{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Live-store readiness by zone

panels.description:
### Catch-up duration by pod
Time spent catching up after startup or lag events. Pod names include live-store zone.

targets.expr: topk(20, tempo_live_store_catch_up_duration_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"})

panels.title: Catch-up duration by pod

panels.description:
### Completion duration by zone
WAL completion latency by live-store zone. Rising p99 with queue depth indicates completion throughput trouble.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_completion_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_completion_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

panels.title: Completion duration by zone

panels.description:
### Blocks completed / failures by zone
Successful block completions, failures, and retries by live-store zone.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_blocks_completed_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_failed_completions_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_completion_retries_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Blocks completed / failures by zone

panels.description:
### Completion failures/s by zone
WAL complete-block failures split by live-store zone. Non-zero means the completion path needs inspection.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_failed_completions_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Completion failures/s by zone

panels.description:
### Completion block size by zone
Completed block size distribution by live-store zone. Large shifts can explain completion latency and memory pressure.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_completion_size_bytes_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, zone) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_completion_size_bytes_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*")))

panels.title: Completion block size by zone

panels.description:
### Blocks cut by zone/reason
Rate of WAL block cuts by zone and reason. Use with block size to confirm expected cut behavior.

targets.expr: sum by (zone, reason) (label_replace(rate(tempo_live_store_blocks_cut_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Blocks cut by zone/reason

panels.description:
### Live traces by zone
Number of in-memory live traces by live-store zone. Sudden growth can create memory pressure and backpressure.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(tempo_live_store_live_traces{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", tenant=~"$tenant", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Live traces by zone

panels.description:
### Live trace memory by zone
Bytes retained for live traces by live-store zone.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(tempo_live_store_live_trace_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", tenant=~"$tenant", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Live trace memory by zone

panels.description:
### Top tenants by traces created/s (current)
Current top tenants by live-store trace creation rate across selected zones. Click a tenant to filter this dashboard or open RT overrides.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (tenant) (rate(tempo_live_store_traces_created_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", tenant=~"$tenant", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Top tenants by traces created/s (current)

panels.description:
### Top tenants by bytes received (current)
Current top tenants by live-store input byte rate across selected zones. Click a tenant to filter this dashboard or open RT overrides.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (tenant) (rate(tempo_live_store_bytes_received_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", tenant=~"$tenant", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Top tenants by bytes received (current)

panels.description:
### CPU pressure by zone
Max and p95 live-store CPU utilization by zone. Use after identifying a skewed zone or queue.

targets.expr: max by (zone) (label_replace(container:cpu_utilisation:ratio{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

quantile by (zone) (0.95, label_replace(container:cpu_utilisation:ratio{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: CPU pressure by zone

panels.description:
### Memory working set by zone
Max and p95 live-store memory working set by zone.

targets.expr: max by (zone) (label_replace(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

quantile by (zone) (0.95, label_replace(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}, "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Memory working set by zone

panels.description:
### Go heap allocation by zone
Go heap allocation churn summed by live-store zone. Rising allocation with backpressure suggests GC/memory pressure.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(rate(go_memstats_alloc_bytes_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__rate_interval]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Go heap allocation by zone

panels.description:
### Restarts over range by zone
Container restarts for live-store pods during the dashboard time range, summed by zone.

targets.expr: sum by (zone) (label_replace(increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"$pod", container="live-store"}[$__range]), "zone", "$1", "pod", "(live-store-zone-[^-]+)-.*"))

panels.title: Restarts over range by zone

panels.description:
### KEDA/HPA replicas
Replica bounds and HPA decisions for live-store when present plus the Warpstream agents that feed the live-store path. Some prod cells do not have a live-store HPA.
panels.title: KEDA/HPA replicas

panels.description:
### KEDA CPU desired replicas
KEDA scaler metric divided by the HPA target, following the Warpstream Agent Read dashboard pattern. Shows which Warpstream agent CPU scaler is driving desired replicas.
panels.title: KEDA CPU desired replicas

panels.description:
### KEDA memory desired replicas
KEDA memory scaler metric divided by the HPA target, following the Warpstream Agent Read dashboard pattern.
panels.title: KEDA memory desired replicas

panels.description:
### KEDA scaler failures
KEDA scaler error rate for live-store when present plus Warpstream agents on the live-store ingest path.
panels.title: KEDA scaler failures
